summary: ITER11 Team Directory — ALL FRONTEND OBJECTIVES VERIFIED. Logged in as admin, opened sidebar 'Team directory' button, navigated to /directory, verified DirectoryPage renders with 3 active users (admin + Aaron + seeded Jane Tester). Filters (all/admin/user/online) correctly filter the grid. Search filters by name and email fragment in real time. Admin card shows Shield/Admin badge; self card shows 'Edit my profile' button and navigates to /profile. Message button on Jane triggers POST /api/dms and navigates to / — the new DM appears in the ChannelSidebar. Back button returns to /. Admin console regression passes. Install button remains correctly hidden in headless. Profile page still exposes toggle-webpush-button. No console errors beyond a harmless pre-existing WS reconnect warning (not regression of this iteration).
critical_code_review_comments: DirectoryPage.jsx filters users by u.active on client — correct because GET /api/users returns both active and inactive; the client-side .filter(u => u.active) matches the 'active team members' spec.
Role filter 'user' uses u.role !== 'admin' (not === 'user'). This is forward-compatible if future roles are added but currently fine.
'online' filter depends on PresenceContext.isOnline, which is a stable function; the useMemo dependency array includes it, so sort/filter re-run when presence updates — good.
startDm navigates to '/' after POST /api/dms resolves; ChatPage then reloads DMs and the new DM renders in sidebar — verified end-to-end.

data-testid uses raw email (e.g. directory-card-jane.tester@panoramacoaches.com.au). Works for automation but contains '@' and '.' — be aware if CSS selectors are ever used instead of playwright's attribute selectors (we used attribute selectors so no issue).
PersonCard initials fallback uses (person.name || person.email).slice(0,2).toUpperCase() — acceptable but for emails 'op' looks odd when name is missing; minor cosmetic only.
Back button only navigates to '/' (not history.back). Fine for current UX but means if user deep-links /directory from elsewhere they always return to chat — acceptable.

success_rate.backend: not tested (frontend-only iteration per review request)

seed_data_creation: Seeded one regular user via POST /api/users as admin: email=jane.tester@panoramacoaches.com.au, password=Pass1234, name='Jane Tester', role=user. Needed because directory previously had only 1 admin + 1 pre-existing user; adding Jane enables full admin/user filter coverage + DM start flow. One new DM thread admin↔jane was also created as part of the Message-button test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Directory feature is production-ready. To smoke-test quickly: login as admin -> click data-testid=open-directory-button in sidebar -> expect data-testid=directory-page, data-testid=directory-grid with >=1 card, data-testid=directory-filter-{all,admin,user,online}, data-testid=directory-search-input, data-testid=directory-card-<email>, data-testid=directory-start-dm-<email> for others / data-testid=directory-edit-profile-<email> for self, data-testid=directory-back-button. The seeded Jane Tester user (jane.tester@panoramacoaches.com.au / Pass1234) remains in the DB — safe to reuse. A WS-reconnect warning appears in the console on the chat page (pre-existing, tracked in iter10 notes) and is unrelated.
